title: Canada Carbon Rebate Statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## Canada Carbon Rebate Statistics
The Canada Carbon Rebate (CCR) statistics present data based on the information that the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) collected and processed for all eligible individuals for a specific tax year.
Please refer to the CCR website for more information.
The CCR was formerly known as the Climate Action Incentive Payment (CAIP), the predecessor of which was the Climate Action Incentive (CAI). For CAI statistics, please refer to Climate Action Incentive statistics publication .
- 2023-2024 Benefit Year
- 2022-2023 Benefit Year
